Explanation: The earliest activation year in the table is 1986 for Henry J. Kaiser (1986–present), making it the first vessel to become active. The only ships that never entered service (remained inactive) are Benjamin Isherwood (launched 1988, never in service) and Henry Eckford (launched 1989, never in service). Since Henry Eckford was launched later and has a later hull number, it is the last vessel to remain inactive. Therefore, “henry j. kaiser|henry eckford” is correct.
